# nb

## Imports

## Source Handling

Functions for joining and processing cell source code. Defined first as
`NbFile` depends on
[`join_source`](https://s01st.github.io/nbdev-mcp/00_utils/nb.html#join_source).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/utils/nb.py#L29"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### join_source

>  join_source (source:Union[str,List[str]])

*Join notebook cell source lines into a single string.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 38%" />
<col style="width: 52%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>source</td>
<td>Union</td>
<td>Cell source as a string or list of strings (Jupyter format).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>str</strong></td>
<td><strong>Joined source code with proper newline
handling.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### truncate

>  truncate (s:str, limit:int=1000, suffix:str='...')

*Truncate string to limit, adding suffix if truncated.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>s</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>String to truncate.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>limit</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>1000</td>
<td>Maximum length before truncation (default 1000).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>suffix</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>…</td>
<td>Suffix to append when truncated (default ‘…’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>str</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Original string if under limit, otherwise truncated with
suffix.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Cell Data Classes

Simple data containers for notebook cells.

target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### Cell

>  Cell (index:int, cell_type:str, source:str, raw:Dict[str,Any])

*A single notebook cell with its metadata.*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>index</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>Zero-based cell index in the notebook.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_type</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Cell type (‘code’ or ‘markdown’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>source</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Cell source code as a single string.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>raw</td>
<td>Dict</td>
<td>Original cell dictionary from notebook JSON.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### Symbol

*A symbol (function, class, or variable) defined in code.*

### Import

>  Import (module:str, names:List[str]=<factory>, is_relative:bool=False,
>              level:int=0)

*An import statement.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>

<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>module</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Module name being imported.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>names</td>
<td>List</td>
<td><factory></td>
<td>Names imported from the module (empty for ‘import foo’ style).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_relative</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>True if this is a relative import (default False).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>level</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>0</td>
<td>Number of dots for relative imports (default 0).</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### iter_project_cells

>  iter_project_cells (project:Path, cell_type:Optional[str]='code',
>                          with_source:bool=True)

*Iterate over all cells in all notebooks in a project.*

This is a convenience function for tools that need to scan all cells
across a project (e.g., linting, analysis).

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Path</td>
<td></td>
<td>Path to the nbdev project root.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_type</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>code</td>
<td>Filter by cell type (‘code’, ‘markdown’), or None for all.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>with_source</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, include source in Cell objects (default True).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Iterable</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
